text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 96 

GAP_INNPP_COPAY_DAILY 

LABEL: Gap Copay Split Network Standard Retail — 1 day supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a one-day supply of the drugs on this 
tier, using an in-network non-preferred pharmacy (INNPP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy 
within a split network) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D
